story.asA: photographer using keyboard-only navigation or touch devices
story.iWant: enhanced slider interactions with keyboard shortcuts, touch gestures, and accessibility features
story.soThat: I can efficiently compare before/after previews using my preferred input method
story.tasks:
### Task 1: Implement Keyboard Shortcuts (AC-1) - Add keyboard event listeners in `web/js/slider.js` for Arrow keys, Home/End, Number keys (0/5/1), Spacebar toggle, Page Up/Down - Create `animateSliderTo()` function with easing (easeInOutCubic) - Handle key repeat for continuous movement - Store toggle position for spacebar return
### Task 2: Implement Touch Gestures (AC-2) - Create `web/js/gestures.js` for touch gesture detection - Implement swipe gestures (touchstart/touchmove/touchend) with velocity - Add double-tap snap zones (left/center/right third) - Implement long press tooltip (500ms threshold) - Add two-finger drag for tablets
### Task 3: Add Visual Feedback and Indicators (AC-3) - Create percentage label HTML and CSS (fade in/out on drag) - Add Before/After labels to slider edges - Implement handle scale animations on hover/active - Add cursor changes (ew-resize on hover) - Update percentage label position dynamically
### Task 4: Implement Smooth Animations (AC-4) - Add CSS transitions for handle scale (100ms), slider movement (150-300ms) - Implement dragging state class for visual feedback - Use requestAnimationFrame for smooth animations - GPU acceleration with transform and will-change
### Task 5: Accessibility Enhancements (AC-5) - Add ARIA attributes (role="slider", aria-valuenow, aria-valuetext) - Create ARIA live region for position announcements - Implement throttled announcements (every 10% change) - Add visible focus ring with :focus-visible - Screen reader instructions element
### Task 6: Multi-Touch Support (AC-6) - Detect two-finger drag gestures for tablets - Implement haptic feedback (iOS Taptic Engine, Android Vibration API) - Add palm rejection logic - Ensure touch targets meet WCAG AAA (60-80px diameter)
### Task 7: Performance Optimization (AC-7) - Add GPU acceleration CSS (will-change: clip-path, transform: translateZ(0)) - Implement debounced updates with requestAnimationFrame - Monitor drag performance with FPS tracking - Lazy rendering for hidden tab images
### Task 8: Unit Tests for Slider Interactions - Create `web/tests/slider.test.js` for keyboard shortcuts - Test ARIA announcement throttling - Test animation timing and easing
### Task 9: Manual Testing - Keyboard testing across all shortcuts - Touch testing on mobile devices - Accessibility testing with screen readers (NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack) - Performance testing with Lighthouse and DevTools
### Task 10: Documentation - Add keyboard shortcuts table to README - Add touch gestures table to README - Document performance targets and optimization strategies

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
**AC-1: Keyboard Shortcuts for Slider Control** - Arrow keys move slider: Left/Right by 5%, repeat key hold for continuous movement - Home/End keys snap: Home to 0% (full before), End to 100% (full after) - Number keys snap: 0 key → 0%, 5 key → 50%, 1 key → 100% - Spacebar toggle: Press to toggle 0%/100%, release to return - Page Up/Down: Move slider by 10% increments
**AC-2: Touch Gestures for Mobile** - Swipe gestures: Swipe left/right to move slider, velocity affects movement - Double-tap snap: Left side → 0%, Center → 50%, Right side → 100% - Pinch gesture (optional): Zoom into image for detail inspection - Long press: Show position tooltip ("50% filtered") on slider handle
**AC-3: Visual Feedback and Indicators** - Slider position percentage display: "50%" above/below handle, fade in/out - Before/After labels: Persistent on left/right edges - Slider track indicators: Subtle gradient, optional tick marks at 0/25/50/75/100% - Drag state visual: Handle grows on drag, cursor changes to ew-resize
**AC-4: Smooth Animations and Transitions** - Slider movement animation: Keyboard 150ms ease-out, Snap 300ms ease-in-out, Drag instant - Handle scale animation: Hover 1.05x (100ms), Active/Dragging 1.1x (100ms) - Percentage label animation: Fade in 200ms, fade out 300ms after 1s inactivity - Performance: All animations 60fps minimum (GPU accelerated)
**AC-5: Accessibility Enhancements for Screen Readers** - ARIA slider role: role="slider", aria-valuemin/max/now, aria-valuetext="50% filtered" - Live region: Throttled announcements every 10% change (not every 1%) - Instructions: aria-describedby with keyboard shortcut instructions - Keyboard focus visible: 2px solid blue focus ring
**AC-6: Multi-Touch Support for Tablets** - Two-finger drag: Alternative to single-finger drag, prevents page scroll - Touch target size: 60px desktop, 80px mobile (exceeds WCAG AAA 44px) - Touch feedback: Haptic on iOS/Android when snapping to position - Palm rejection: Ignore large touch areas vs intentional finger touches
**AC-7: Performance Optimization for Slider Rendering** - GPU acceleration: will-change: clip-path, transform: translateZ(0) - Debounced position updates: Max 60fps (16.67ms interval) - ARIA announcements: Throttled to 10% intervals - Performance targets: Drag latency <16ms, Keyboard <50ms, 60fps minimum

docs.doc: Complete preview modal requirements including slider interaction strategy. Performance targets: modal open <300ms, slider 60fps, CSS filter <100ms. Keyboard shortcuts, touch gestures, accessibility requirements documented.
CSS clip-path vs mask comparison. Recommends clip-path for 97% browser support, simple syntax, GPU acceleration. Slider position update with CSS variables and requestAnimationFrame.
Base slider implementation with modal open/close, before/after slider structure, tab switching, parameter display. Story 11-4 enhances with keyboard shortcuts, touch gestures, accessibility.

Basic slider interaction: mouse drag, touch drag, basic keyboard (arrow keys). Story 11-4 adds advanced keyboard shortcuts (Home/End, Number keys, Spacebar, Page Up/Down) and touch gestures (swipe, double-tap, long press).
Basic keyboard navigation (Tab, Arrow keys, Esc). Story 11-4 enhances with full keyboard shortcut suite and ARIA live regions for screen readers.
Keyboard accessibility patterns: Enter/Space activation, Tab navigation, focus indicators. Story 11-4 follows same patterns for slider keyboard shortcuts.
Touch device detection patterns (isTouchDevice), responsive adaptations. Story 11-4 extends with slider-specific touch gestures (swipe, double-tap, long press).
Touch target sizes (minimum 48px per WCAG AAA), hover state disabling on touch devices. Story 11-4 uses 60-80px slider handle for even better touch ergonomics.

file.reason: Existing CSS with patterns for animations, transitions, responsive design, touch adaptations. Slider enhancements will follow same design system.

code.file: Comprehensive CSS with global reset, header styles, responsive breakpoints (768px tablet, 1024px desktop), touch-specific styles (@media hover: none), animation patterns (fadeIn, slideDown, shake). Slider animations will match existing aesthetic.

file.reason: Touch detection and responsive adaptation logic. Slider touch gestures will integrate with existing isTouchDevice() function.

code.file: Touch device detection (ontouchstart, maxTouchPoints), UI adaptations for touch (tap text, collapsed panels). Slider will use same detection for enabling touch gestures.

file.reason: Main application entry point. Slider module will be imported and initialized here.

code.file: Imports all modules (WASM loader, file handler, format detector, parameter display, converter, downloader). Slider enhancements will integrate as new module.

file.reason: Story 11-3: Base slider implementation with mouse/touch drag and basic arrow key support. Story 11-4 adds advanced keyboard shortcuts and touch gestures.

code.file: Basic slider logic: mouse drag, touch drag, arrow keys (←/→ move 5%). To be enhanced with Home/End, Number keys, Spacebar toggle, Page Up/Down, swipe gestures, double-tap, long press.

file.reason: Story 11-3: Modal management (open/close, focus trap). Slider enhancements integrate with existing modal structure.

code.file: Modal open/close logic, body scroll lock, Esc key handling, overlay click. Slider keyboard shortcuts will respect focus trap and modal state.

file.reason: Keyboard accessibility example: Enter/Space key handling for file upload. Slider will follow same pattern for keyboard shortcuts.

code.file: Keyboard event handling (Enter, Space keys) for activating file upload. Pattern: e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ', e.preventDefault(). Slider shortcuts use same approach.

file.reason: Parameter formatting and display logic. Slider percentage label formatting follows similar patterns.

code.file: formatParameterValue() function with sign prefixes, units, grouping. Slider percentage label ("50%") uses similar formatting approach.

frontend.package: Pure vanilla JavaScript, no external dependencies

browser-apis.api: brightness(), contrast(), saturate(), hue-rotate() for preview

build.tool: Static HTML/CSS/JS, no build step required

story-context.constraints:
- Slider interaction must maintain 60fps minimum (16.67ms per frame) - Keyboard input latency must be <50ms (responsive feel) - Drag latency must be <16ms (60fps target) - Animation smoothness: 60fps minimum on desktop, 60fps minimum on mobile (iPhone 8, 2017) - Touch targets must be 60px diameter (desktop), 80px (mobile) - exceeds WCAG AAA 44px minimum
- Slider styles must match existing web interface aesthetic (purple gradient, clean modern design) - Keyboard shortcuts must follow standard conventions (Home/End for start/end, Arrow keys for incremental) - Touch gestures must follow mobile app patterns (swipe for continuous, double-tap for snap) - Visual feedback must be immediate (no perceived lag)
- CSS clip-path support: Chrome 57+, Firefox 52+, Safari 11+, Edge 16+ (97% browser support) - Touch Events support: All modern mobile browsers (iOS Safari, Chrome Android) - Vibration API support: Chrome, Firefox, Opera (graceful degradation for Safari) - ARIA live regions: All modern browsers and screen readers (NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack)
- Must integrate with Story 11-3 base slider implementation (enhance, not replace) - Must work with existing modal focus trap (Story 11-3) - Must not interfere with modal close shortcuts (Esc key) - Must not interfere with tab switching shortcuts (Arrow keys when tabs focused)
- All keyboard shortcuts must work without mouse (keyboard-only users) - Screen readers must announce slider position changes (throttled to 10% to avoid spam) - Focus must remain visible during keyboard interaction (:focus-visible) - Touch targets must meet WCAG 2.1 Level AAA (44x44px minimum, using 60-80px) - Color contrast must meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA (4.5:1 for text)
- Slider animations must use GPU acceleration (will-change: clip-path, transform) - Position updates must be debounced to 60fps max (no faster than 16.67ms) - ARIA announcements throttled to 10% intervals (not every 1% to avoid screen reader spam) - No JavaScript image processing (CSS filters only) - FPS monitoring in development mode (performance.now() tracking)

interfaces.interface: Updates slider position (0-100%). Called by mouse/touch drag, keyboard shortcuts. Updates clip-path, ARIA attributes, percentage label. Story 11-4 adds ARIA live region updates and throttling.

NEW in Story 11-4. Animates slider from current position to targetPos over duration milliseconds. Uses requestAnimationFrame with easeInOutCubic easing. Called by keyboard shortcuts (Home/End, Number keys).
NEW in Story 11-4. Initializes touch gesture detection: swipe, double-tap, long press, two-finger drag. Attaches event listeners to sliderEl. Called on modal open.
NEW in Story 11-4. Detects swipe gesture from touchstart/touchmove/touchend events. Returns direction and velocity. Used to move slider based on swipe speed.
NEW in Story 11-4. Detects double-tap within 300ms. Returns zone (left third → 0%, center → 50%, right third → 100%). Snaps slider to position.
NEW in Story 11-4. Handles all keyboard shortcuts: Arrow keys, Home/End, Number keys (0/5/1), Spacebar toggle, Page Up/Down. Calls animateSliderTo() or updateSliderPosition() based on key.
NEW in Story 11-4. Updates ARIA live region with throttled position announcements. Only announces when crossing 10% thresholds (0%, 10%, 20%, ..., 100%). Prevents screen reader spam.
NEW in Story 11-4. Triggers haptic feedback on iOS (Taptic Engine) or Android (Vibration API). Called when slider snaps to position (0%, 50%, 100%). Graceful degradation if not supported.
Story 11-3: Opens preview modal. Story 11-4 enhancements initialize after modal opens: keyboard shortcuts, touch gestures, ARIA live regions.

tests.standards: Testing follows Epic 2 patterns: unit tests for pure functions (JavaScript), manual testing for DOM interactions and visual verification. No external test frameworks required - use browser console for unit tests and manual interaction for integration tests. Browser compatibility testing on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest versions). Mobile testing on real devices (iPhone, Android) or browser DevTools device emulation. Performance testing with Lighthouse CI for INP metrics, Chrome DevTools Performance panel for FPS tracking. Accessibility testing with NVDA (Windows), VoiceOver (macOS/iOS), TalkBack (Android).

locations.location: Browser console for manual unit tests
Chrome/Firefox/Safari DevTools for debugging and performance
Lighthouse CI for performance metrics (INP, CLS)
Manual testing documentation in story completion notes

ideas.test: Test keyboard shortcut handling: - Arrow Left/Right: Moves slider by 5%, clamps to 0-100% - Home key: Snaps to 0%, End key: Snaps to 100% - Number keys 0/5/1: Snap to 0%/50%/100% - Spacebar toggle: Toggles to opposite (0% ↔ 100%), returns on release - Page Up/Down: Moves by 10%, clamps to 0-100%

Test animation timing: - animateSliderTo(targetPos, duration) completes in expected duration ±10ms - easeInOutCubic easing function produces correct values (0.0 → 0.5 → 1.0) - requestAnimationFrame called on each frame (60fps = ~16.67ms intervals)

Test ARIA announcement throttling: - announcePosition(50) updates live region to "50% filtered" - announcePosition(55) does NOT update (within 10% threshold) - announcePosition(60) updates live region to "60% filtered" - Verify lastAnnouncedPosition tracking prevents duplicate announcements

Touch gesture testing: - Swipe right: Slider moves right (show more "after") - Swipe left: Slider moves left (show more "before") - Fast swipe: Larger movement than slow swipe (velocity detection) - Double-tap left third: Snaps to 0% - Double-tap center third: Snaps to 50% - Double-tap right third: Snaps to 100% - Long press handle (500ms): Tooltip appears showing position

Visual feedback testing: - Drag slider: Percentage label appears ("50%"), positioned above handle - Stop dragging: Percentage label fades out after 1 second - Hover handle: Scales to 1.05x (100ms transition) - Drag handle: Scales to 1.1x, shadow increases - Release handle: Returns to 1.0x (150ms ease-out)

Multi-touch testing: - Two-finger drag left/right: Moves slider (alternative to single-finger) - Verify page doesn't scroll during two-finger drag (preventDefault) - Snap to position: Haptic feedback triggers (vibrate 10ms on Android) - iOS: Taptic Engine light impact (if supported) - Touch target size: Slider handle minimum 60px desktop, 80px mobile

Performance testing: - Open DevTools Performance panel, record during slider drag - Verify 60fps minimum (no dropped frames, green bars in timeline) - Check GPU acceleration: Layers panel shows slider on GPU layer - Monitor FPS with performance.now(): Calculate dragFrames / dragDuration * 1000 - Target: 60fps average, warn if <60fps in console

Lighthouse audit: - Run Lighthouse with modal open and slider interaction - Verify Interaction to Next Paint (INP) <200ms - Verify Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) = 0 (slider doesn't shift layout) - Check Performance score: Target 90+

Screen reader testing: - NVDA (Windows): Open preview, move slider with arrow keys - Verify announcements: "0% filtered", "10% filtered", "20% filtered" (every 10%) - VoiceOver (macOS): Same test, verify announcements - TalkBack (Android): Same test, verify announcements - Verify slider role announced: "Slider, 50% filtered"

Keyboard focus testing: - Tab to slider handle, verify focus ring visible (2px solid blue) - Press Arrow keys: Focus ring remains visible during interaction - Mouse drag slider: Focus ring hidden (not dragging with keyboard) - Verify :focus-visible working correctly (focus ring only on keyboard)

Cross-browser testing: - Chrome (latest): All shortcuts, gestures, animations work - Firefox (latest): All shortcuts, gestures, animations work - Safari (latest): All shortcuts, gestures, animations work (Taptic iOS 13+) - Edge (latest): All shortcuts, gestures, animations work - Mobile Safari (iOS): Touch gestures, haptic feedback work - Chrome Android: Touch gestures, vibration API work

- Slider at 0%: Arrow Left does nothing (clamped), Home key does nothing - Slider at 100%: Arrow Right does nothing (clamped), End key does nothing - Rapid keyboard input: Slider responds to all inputs, no lag - Modal closed mid-animation: Animation stops cleanly, no errors - Spacebar held too long: Toggle repeats correctly (return on release) - Tab switch mid-slider drag: Slider position preserved, drag stops gracefully - Multiple touch points: Only first touch or two-finger drag recognized
